title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSDL Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSDL Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSDL Asia Pacific Associates:
NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDL Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
